---
title: "PS270 Final Project"
author: "Chloe Burreson"
description: "My final project"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---



## Project thoughts

I am interested in exploring data related to...

  I was think about explore data in regards to opinion polls. Last semester I did minor research using A.N.E.S (American National Election Studies) which is academically run and observes voters behavior and opinion before and after entering the voting booth. I found analyzing the data to be quite interesting! While I may not necessarily be able to use ANES data for this final project I think working with data opinion polls in general could be quite interesting. 

  I think another area of possible interest could be looking at data in regards to debts or financial crisis, global and/or domestic. I tend to find information and exploring into the statics and numbers resulting from finanical crisis all to be quite fascinating.
